name: Potato Fans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small saucepan, melt together the butter, garlic, and parsley.
3. Peel each potato and cut each potato crosswise into 1/4-inch slices without slicing all the way through the potato.
4. Place potatoes in a baking dish and drizzle with the butter mixture.
5. Bake for 1 hour or until golden, crispy, and the potatoes have fanned out. Serve hot.
